description: Phase 1 stabilization: Fix typecheck errors, fix lint errors, improve error handling, and add health check infrastructure. Currently there are 16 typecheck errors (test file type issues + 1 WorkLedger.tsx error) and 88 lint errors (label association, unused vars, noExplicitAny, noNonNullAssertion). Fix the blocking issues without breaking existing functionality.
steps: Fix typecheck errors in artifacts/edms/src/test/setup.ts: (1) Add @testing-library/jest-dom types - check if @testing-library/jest-dom is in node_modules and add reference directive or configure tsconfig.json, (2) fix afterEach not found by adding vitest globals reference.

Fix typecheck errors in artifacts/edms/src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary.test.tsx and LoadingState.test.tsx: These test files use jest-dom matchers (toBeInTheDocument, toHaveClass) not recognized by TypeScript. Either add triple-slash reference to vitest globals types or update tsconfig to include test types.
Fix typecheck error in artifacts/edms/src/pages/WorkLedger.tsx line 811: 'Expected 2-3 arguments, but got 1' - investigate the function call and provide the missing argument.
Fix critical lint errors - specifically the unused variable 'rerender' and the 5 label-input association issues (add htmlFor attributes or nest inputs in labels).
Fix the static element interactivity issue found by biome lint.
Add proper error boundary wrapping around the Outlet in AppLayout to prevent white-screen crashes (referenced in ISSUE_REGISTER S-001).
Create a frontend feature flags utility at artifacts/edms/src/lib/featureFlags.ts that reads from environment variables (VITE_FF_*) to gate risky features behind toggles.

Create a config/ocr_pipeline.yaml (or equivalent TypeScript config) defining OCR pipeline parameters as specified in requirements (tile size, overlap, DPI, timeouts, etc.) - this is documentation/config only, not implementation.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm run typecheck passes with zero errors (or at minimum reduces errors significantly from 16)
pnpm run lint:frontend error count is reduced (target: eliminate the 5 label errors and unused variable)
pnpm run test still passes (existing tests not broken)
ErrorBoundary wraps page content in AppLayout
Feature flags utility exists and is importable
OCR pipeline config file exists with documented parameters
verification: export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/installs/node/22.22.3/bin:$PATH" && cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && pnpm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5
export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/installs/node/22.22.3/bin:$PATH" && cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && pnpm run build 2>&1 | tail -5
export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/installs/node/22.22.3/bin:$PATH" && cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && pnpm run test 2>&1 | tail -5
export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/installs/node/22.22.3/bin:$PATH" && cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && pnpm run lint:frontend 2>&1 | grep 'Found'
findings: All 16 typecheck errors resolved to 0. Lint errors reduced from 88 to 81 (7 errors fixed: 5 label-input associations, 1 unused var, 1 static element interactivity). The remaining lint errors are mostly noExplicitAny and noNonNullAssertion warnings in other files, plus 2 static element issues in BOMProductView.tsx. Two pre-existing test failures exist in ThemeContext.test.tsx and useOverloadProtection.test.ts (timing-related, not caused by our changes - verified by testing on base state). ErrorBoundary already wraps Outlet in AppLayout.tsx (was implemented in a prior phase). Feature flags utility created at src/lib/featureFlags.ts. OCR pipeline config created at config/ocr_pipeline.yaml. Three commits: 47c73a1, 37af494, b147ba4.
